title: Unauthorised highmem submission audit
difficulty_justification: Two chained calls: rbac.list_permissions to confirm the role can read audit data, then slurm.query_jobs filtered to the highmem partition over the last 24 h; flag entries whose submitting user is not in the partition's AllowGroups.
query_text: Were there any unauthorised attempts to submit jobs to the highmem partition in the last 24 hours? Give me a clean list of (user, job_id, timestamp) and what made each attempt unauthorised.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Two unauthorised attempts: (jsmith, job 920104, 2026-04-30T22:11Z) - jsmith belongs only to proj_a which has no highmem allocation, attempt rejected by SLURM AllowGroups; (rliu, job 920221, 2026-05-01T03:42Z) - rliu in proj_b, allocation expired 2026-04-29, attempt rejected. Both rejections logged. No successful unauthorised submissions in the window.

checkpoints.description: Agent confirms its role can query audit data.
Agent queries jobs targeting partition=highmem in the trailing 24 h.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains slurm.query_jobs filtered to partition=highmem within the last 24 h

checkpoints.description: Final answer lists both attempts with user, job_id, and reason.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer references jobs 920104 and 920221 with their submitter usernames and the AllowGroups/allocation reason
